name: Tom Segura
bio: Tom Segura is an American stand-up comedian, writer, and podcaster known for a deadpan, confessional storytelling style built on family, his body, and self-deprecation. He rose to prominence through a run of Netflix specials beginning with Completely Normal and continuing through Mostly Stories, Disgraceful, Ball Hog, and Sledgehammer. He co-hosts the podcasts Your Moms House with his wife Christina Pazsitzky and Two Bears One Cave with Bert Kreischer.

timeline.ev: Begins stand-up after graduating from Lenoir-Rhyne University
Launches the Your Moms House podcast with Christina Pazsitzky
Releases his first Netflix special, Completely Normal

accolades: Co-host of the chart-topping podcast Two Bears One Cave
Among the top-grossing touring comedians of his era
